title: How ELGi Plans Scale Globally
channelDescription:
At ELGi Equipments Limited, ((BSE: 522074 NSE: ELGIEQUIP), we are redefining compressed air technology with innovation, reliability, and superior engineering. As a global leader in air compressor manufacturing, we offer cutting-edge solutions that power industries worldwide. With a presence in 120+ countries and a diverse portfolio of 400+ products, we help our customers maximize productivity while reducing the total cost of ownership. At ELGi, we don’t just manufacture compressors—we build long-term partnerships based on trust, technology, and shared success. Our vision is clear - “Always be the choice everywhere.”

ELGi offers a complete range of compressed air solutions, from oil-lubricated and oil-free rotary screw compressors, oil-lubricated and oil-free reciprocating compressors, and centrifugal compressors, to dryers, filters, and downstream accessories and, vacuum solutions. For more information, visit https://www.elgi.com/in/

For more information, visit https://www.elgi.com/in/

text:
What does it take to build a globally competitive manufacturing company? In a conversation with mojo4industry, Dr. Jairam Varadaraj, Managing Director, Elgi Equipments, reflected on the principles that have shaped ELGi’s journey from being outside the top 100 global air compressor manufacturers to becoming one of the world’s top six today.
 
A recurring theme throughout the discussion was the importance of understanding not just the know-how, but also the know-why behind products and processes. As Dr. Varadaraj shared, long-term competitiveness must be built on technology, engineering excellence, quality systems, manufacturing capability, and a relentless focus on customer value.
 
From developing energy-efficient technologies that help reduce lifecycle costs, to investing in selective backward integration, digital capability, talent development, and organisational agility, ELGi’s growth story has been shaped by a commitment to building sustainable competitive advantage through innovation and continuous improvement.
 
As global manufacturing continues to navigate disruption and change, the conversation offers valuable perspectives on building resilient organisations, creating globally competitive products, and taking engineering excellence from India to the world.
 
Today, ELGi serves customers across 120+ countries and continues its journey towards becoming one of the world’s top three air compressor manufacturers.
 
#ELGi #AlwaysBetter #Manufacturing #Innovation #EngineeringExcellence #GlobalManufacturing #Leadership #EnergyEfficiency #Technology #MakeInIndia

text:
At the INTEC 2026 press meet held at the ELGi booth, Dr. Jairam Varadaraj, Managing Director, Elgi Equipments, addressed questions from journalists on ELGi’s long-term global growth ambitions, strategy to become one of the world’s top three compressed air manufacturers, expansion plans, differentiated technologies, sustainability initiatives, manufacturing investments, and the evolving global compressed air market.

The interaction also covered ELGi’s focus on energy-efficient compressor technologies, renewable energy adoption, resource conservation, global market expansion, navigating geopolitical and raw material challenges, and building a fundamentally strong and resilient global business.

Watch the video to hear Dr. Jairam Varadaraj’s perspectives on ELGi’s growth journey, technology-led differentiation, sustainability focus, and vision for ELGi’s future in the global compressed air business.

#ELGi #AlwaysBetter #INTEC2026 #CompressedAir #Manufacturing #IndustrialGrowth #EnergyEfficiency #Sustainability #BusinessLeadership

text:
In a world shaped by uncertainty, sustainable growth is built on strong fundamentals, customer trust, and disciplined execution.
 
In his interaction with CNBC-TV18, Dr. Jairam Varadaraj, Managing Director, Elgi Equipments, shared his perspectives on ELGi's long-term growth journey, the strategic importance of India, Europe, and the US markets, and the company's continued focus on creating value through innovation, localization, and aftermarket excellence.
 
While global economic conditions continue to evolve, ELGi remains focused on strengthening its market presence, deepening customer relationships, and building a resilient business for the future.
 
As Dr. Jairam Varadaraj highlighted, repeat customers, strong market acceptance, and a clear long-term vision continue to provide confidence in ELGi's growth trajectory.

channelDescription:

As a global leader in air compressor manufacturing, we offer cutting-edge solutions that power industries worldwide. With a presence in 120+ countries and a diverse portfolio of 400+ products, we help our customers maximize productivity while reducing the total cost of ownership. At ELGi, we don’t just manufacture compressors—we build long-term partnerships based on trust, technology, and shared success. Our vision is clear - “Always be the choice everywhere.”

ELGi offers a complete range of compressed air solutions, from oil-lubricated and oil-free rotary screw compressors, oil-lubricated and oil-free reciprocating compressors, and centrifugal compressors, to dryers, filters, and downstream accessories and, vacuum solutions. For more information, visit https://www.elgi.com/in/

text:
Can your compressed air system adapt as quickly as your production demands fluctuate? This question sparked insightful discussions at our Customer Networking Meet in Visakhapatnam, where professionals from the general manufacturing, food processing, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries came together to explore practical ways to improve operational efficiency and reduce energy costs.

One common challenge resonated across industries: how to balance productivity with energy efficiency as compressed air demand varies throughout the production cycle. The discussions focused on how the ELGi Demand=Match™ System intelligently aligns compressed air supply with actual plant demand, while predictive monitoring solutions such as Air~Alert provide greater visibility into system performance, enabling proactive maintenance and improved operational reliability.

The event also featured live product showcases of the ELGi EQ 22 DM and TS 05 LD compressors, creating opportunities for meaningful conversations around energy efficiency, sustainability, and long-term operational performance.

One key takeaway stood out: achieving greater efficiency is about delivering the right amount of compressed air, at the right time, while maximizing reliability and minimizing energy consumption.

A sincere thank you to everyone who joined us in Visakhapatnam and shared their perspectives. Together, these conversations continue to shape smarter, more sustainable manufacturing.

#ELGi #AlwaysBetter #DemandMatch #CompressedAir #EnergyEfficiency #IndustrialEfficiency #ManufacturingExcellence #PredictiveMaintenance #Visakhapatnam

text:
Building Globally Competitive MSMEs 

How can Indian MSMEs build globally competitive businesses in an increasingly uncertain world? In this thought-provoking keynote delivered at The Hindu BusinessLine MSME Growth Conclave 2026, Dr. Jairam Varadaraj, Managing Director, Elgi Equipments, challenges conventional thinking on innovation, growth, leadership, and value creation. 

Drawing on real-world examples and practical business insights, he encourages entrepreneurs and business leaders to rethink long-held assumptions, from moving beyond "me-too" products to creating "I-first" products, discovering customers' unstated needs, scaling with purpose, and building organizations founded on strong governance, compliance, and long-term thinking. 

As India's manufacturing ecosystem continues to evolve, these ideas offer valuable perspectives for entrepreneurs, MSMEs, manufacturers, and business leaders aspiring to build globally competitive enterprises. 
Watch the complete keynote and join the conversation. 

#ELGi #AlwaysBetter #MSME #Manufacturing #Innovation #Leadership #BusinessGrowth #EngineeringExcellence #BusinessLine #Keynote

text:
On the occasion of World Environment Day 2026, ELGi School celebrated the spirit of sustainability through a meaningful Sapling Plantation and Seed Sowing Ceremony themed “Planting Hope, Growing Dreams.”
 
The event marked not only a commitment towards environmental responsibility, but also the beginning of a new learning journey for the second batch of Grade 6 Stellar students. As students planted saplings and sowed seeds alongside their parents, the celebration beautifully reflected the connection between nurturing nature and nurturing young minds.
 
Students were encouraged to become responsible stewards of the environment by protecting natural resources and contributing towards a greener future.
 
Each sapling planted symbolized hope, every seed sown represented possibility, and the occasion became a meaningful reminder that small actions today can help shape a more sustainable tomorrow.
 
At ELGi School, we believe education goes beyond classrooms by nurturing responsibility, compassion, and values that help students grow into thoughtful individuals and future changemakers.
 
Together, we planted more than saplings; we planted dreams, hope, and a promise for a better future.
 
#WorldEnvironmentDay #ELGiSchool #Sustainability #PlantingHopeGrowingDreams #EnvironmentDay #FutureChangemakers #GreenerTomorrow

text:
At ELGi, automation is not just about technology—it's about aligning people, precision, and purpose.
 
We are committed to creating smart, adaptable, and efficient manufacturing systems that support our teams, strengthen quality, and improve overall performance.
 
Every effort starts with a fundamental question: How can this be improved? Improved for operators through better ergonomics, for customers through reliable and precise outcomes, and for the environment through more efficient use of resources.
 
Driven by this mindset, our manufacturing engineering teams continuously push boundaries—developing automation solutions that integrate intelligence, flexibility, and dependability.
 
From the shop floor to final assembly, each innovation reflects our philosophy of Automation Redefined – The ELGi Way.
 
This is the first in a series showcasing how automation is transforming manufacturing across ELGi. Follow our page to explore the innovations, engineering excellence, and automation initiatives shaping the future of manufacturing at ELGi.
 
#ELGi #AutomationRedefined #ManufacturingExcellence #IndustrialAutomation #EngineeringExcellence #Innovation #SmartManufacturing #Industry #AlwaysBetter

text:
Innovation doesn't always come from outside. Sometimes, it is built right on the shop floor. At ELGi's Rotorbay facility, the ELGi Deburr, an automation solution developed in-house, is helping redefine manufacturing productivity. By eliminating manual intervention and automating pallet system integration, the solution has reduced cycle time by 50% and increased deburring capacity by 81%.
 
Designed, developed, and deployed by ELGi teams, the solution reflects our commitment to manufacturing excellence, continuous improvement, and building world-class capabilities that enhance quality, productivity, and customer value.
 
This is how innovation at ELGi continues to power performance. Stay tuned as we showcase more examples of how automation, engineering, and continuous improvement are shaping manufacturing excellence across ELGi.
 
#TheELGiWay #MadeByELGi #ManufacturingExcellence #IndustrialInnovation #SmartManufacturing #Automation

title: The new BOGE E-Series: The High-Quality Budget Compressor
channelName: BOGE EN Compressed Air & Gas Solutions
channelDescription:
Welcome to the official YouTube channel of BOGE Compressed Air & Gas Solutions!
For over 115 years, BOGE has stood for compressed air technology made in Germany – from screw, piston, and scroll compressors to complete turbo compressor systems. As one of the market leaders, we deliver compressed air solutions to more than 120 countries worldwide.

Since 2023, INMATEC GaseTechnologie, as part of the BOGE Group, has expanded our portfolio with industrial nitrogen and oxygen generation – for an integrated compressed air and gas supply from a single source.
On this channel, we show you what’s behind our products: insights into production, technology explained, innovations, and everything about the world of compressed air.

📍 Family-owned company from Bielefeld | Around 800 employees | Active worldwide

▶️ Subscribe to our channel so you don’t miss anything!
🔗 Learn more: www.boge.com

aboutChannelInfo.channelName: BOGE EN Compressed Air & Gas Solutions

text:
Compressed air is essential in many industries. But not everyone needs high-end technology – often, you just need a reliable compressor that works whenever it’s needed. This is exactly where the new BOGE E-series comes in.

In this video, Jonas Begemann, Product Manager at BOGE in Bielefeld, presents the highlights of the E-series:

Genuine BOGE Technology: Featuring the BOGE airend, developed and manufactured in Germany.

Efficiency: Equipped with an IE3 motor and the proven GM drive system – manual belt tensioning is a thing of the past.

Versatility: Available from 4 to 30 kW, as a standalone compressor or a complete compressed air station on a receiver with a dryer.

Compact & Robust: As compact as a Euro pallet, yet durable and easy to maintain.

Safety & Service:
BOGE is by your side. With transparent service packs and the "BOGE BestCare" program, you can even receive up to 3 years of warranty on main components when serviced by trained technicians.

The BOGE E-series is available for order now (Delivery starting June 2026).
Discover all versions at boge.de or talk to your local BOGE partner.

On our channel, you'll get exclusive insights into the world of compressed air: from production and innovative technologies to solutions for your compressed air supply. Whether screw, piston, scroll, or turbo compressors – we show you what's behind our products.

📌 More about BOGE:
🌐 Website: https://www.boge.com/en/

With a presence in 120+ countries and a diverse portfolio of 400+ products, we help our customers maximize productivity while reducing the total cost of ownership. At ELGi, we don’t just manufacture compressors—we build long-term partnerships based on trust, technology, and shared success. Our vision is clear - “Always be the choice everywhere.”

ELGi offers a complete range of compressed air solutions, from oil-lubricated and oil-free rotary screw compressors, oil-lubricated and oil-free reciprocating compressors, and centrifugal compressors, to dryers, filters, and downstream accessories and, vacuum solutions. For more information, visit https://www.elgi.com/in/

text:
ELGi recently hosted a Customer Networking Meet in Haridwar, bringing together valued customers from the General Engineering, Electrical, Pharma, and Automobile industries for an engaging session focused on improving energy efficiency, productivity, and operational reliability.

The event provided an opportunity for customers to connect, exchange experiences, and gain insights into solutions such as the ELGi Demand=Match™ System, EG PM technology, Air~Alert, and EG Super Premium Two-Stage Air Compressors. Discussions focused on how industries can optimize compressed air systems, reduce energy consumption, improve plant uptime, and achieve more sustainable operational performance.

The meet also fostered meaningful conversations around industry challenges, best practices, and emerging opportunities, enabling participants to learn from one another and explore practical ways to enhance efficiency and lower operating costs.

We sincerely thank all our customers for their active participation and valuable contributions, which made the event both insightful and impactful. At ELGi, we remain committed to partnering with our customers to deliver innovative compressed air solutions that drive measurable results, improve productivity, and support a more sustainable future.

#ELGi #CustomerNetworkingMeet #Haridwar #CompressedAir #EnergyEfficiency #ManufacturingExcellence #IndustrialProductivity #IndustryConnect

text:
Day 1 at the Food & Beverage Expo 2026 was off to a great start! 
 
We're showcasing advanced compressed air solutions designed to help food and beverage manufacturers improve productivity, ensure product quality, and enhance operational efficiency. Engineered to meet the industry's stringent quality standards, our solutions deliver reliable, high-performance compressed air for critical applications.
 
Visit our stall to experience the AB Series Oil-Free Compressors and the patented ELGi  Demand=Match System, helping manufacturers achieve Class 0 oil-free air, greater reliability, and lower energy costs.

June 05–06, 2026
 
We look forward to connecting with you.

title: Sullair Electronic Spiral Valve Technology
channelDescription: We build the machines that power industry. We are Hitachi Global Air Power, a leading global industrial compressed air manufacturer. Headquartered in Michigan City, Indiana, our Sullair brand compressed air solutions power manufacturing operations all around the globe; from food and beverage, to pharmaceuticals and computer chips. Our portable compressors provide the air power to build roads and bridges, lay pipelines and aid in oil and gas mining and production.

aboutChannelInfo.channelDescription: We build the machines that power industry. We are Hitachi Global Air Power, a leading global industrial compressed air manufacturer. Headquartered in Michigan City, Indiana, our Sullair brand compressed air solutions power manufacturing operations all around the globe; from food and beverage, to pharmaceuticals and computer chips. Our portable compressors provide the air power to build roads and bridges, lay pipelines and aid in oil and gas mining and production.

text: Exclusive Sullair Electronic Spiral Valve Technology features a cutting-edge air end design to automatically match air supply to demand—delivering significant energy savings. Built on over 30 years of proven Sullair spiral expertise, this technology provides one of the most cost-effective capacity control solutions available on the market.

title: Direct Drive Rotary Screw Air Compressor
channelDescription:
FS-Curtis has been committed to building reliable, high-performing products backed by honest, personal customer service. FS-Curtis compressors have a worldwide reputation for quality, and it comes from a dedication that dates back more than 170 years. FS-Curtis' manufacturing and corporate offices are proudly located in St. Louis, Missouri where we've been since 1854.

For reciprocating air compressors, rotary screw air compressors and other industrial equipment, FS-Curtis is the proven choice.
